products.name: WD_BLACK SN850X NVMe SSD
products.description: Crush load times and slash throttling, lagging, and texture pop-ins with the WD_BLACK SN850X NVMe SSD. Built for top-tier performance with 7,300MB/s speeds.
products.longDescription: Insane speeds up to 7,300 MB/s deliver top-tier performance with ridiculously short load times — for the elite gaming experience you’ve been waiting for. All capacities have an optional heatsink version that's not only eye-catching, but also helps your rig maintain peak performance through your most intense gaming sessions.

products.name: Alto Keys K98M Mechanical Keyboard
products.description: A wireless mechanical keyboard with UniCushion gasket that absorbs vibration to enhance the rich, satisfying sound of each keystroke.
products.longDescription: Transform your workspace into a place of tactile and auditory inspiration. Easy-switch up to 3 devices simultaneously.

products.name: Logitech G502 X PLUS
products.description: Reinvented with first-ever LIGHTFORCE hybrid switches, LIGHTSPEED pro-grade wireless, LIGHTSYNC RGB, and HERO 25K sensor.
products.longDescription: The latest addition to the legendary G502 lineage. Unleash unbridled high-performance precision.

products.name: Satechi Mac mini M4 Hub & Stand
products.description: Expand your Mac Mini M4 capabilities with NVMe SSD enclosure and 5-in-1 Expansion Ports.
products.longDescription: Crafted to seamlessly match your Mac Mini M4, this hub combines durability with a slim, micro design that fits perfectly with the aesthetic.

products.name: MSI GeForce RTX 3050 Ventus 2X
products.description: Dual Fan Thermal Design featuring TORX Fan 3.0 and Zero Frozr technology for extreme silent operation.
products.longDescription: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3050 brings power and performance with MSI's robust cooling thermal design.

products.name: Kinetic Air 14"
products.description: Unleash studio-grade performance on the go. M2 Ultra architecture.
